{{Quote|Boss, they just got Ketku!|[[Renegade Three]], to [[Arhul Narra/Legends|Arhul Narra]], during the [[Battle of Derra IV]]|<ref name="ESBr" />}}
'''Ketku''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and member of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron's]]<ref name="RS/RF">According to ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', Renegade Flight was a subunit of Red Squadron at the time of the Battle of Derra IV.</ref> [[Renegade Flight]] under Commander [[Arhul Narra/Legends|Narra]] when the group of fighters were escorting a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] convoy that was carrying supplies from [[Derra IV/Legends|Derra IV]] to [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. When the entire convoy was [[Battle of Derra IV|wiped out]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], Ketku was one of the first to be [[Death/Legends|killed]], followed shortly by [[Renegade Leader]] Narra and a pilot flying under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] [[Renegade Three]].<ref name="ESBr" />
